markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and resolve GA4 data tracking issues.](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strong Early Performance:** New content is performing well, with \>200 clicks from Google Search in under a month.](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**GA4 Data Discrepancy:** GA4 traffic data is significantly lower than Google Search Console (GSC) data, indicating a tracking error likely caused by the recent CookieBot implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Shift:** Talaera requested prioritizing the 5 remaining blog posts for B2B and customer support topics to align with current business goals.](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [**Phase 1 Wrap-up:** Aida will deliver a summary report with Phase 2 recommendations before handing off the account to a new GrowthX manager.](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)

## Topics

### GA4 Data Discrepancy

  - [**Problem:** GA4 traffic data is significantly lower than GSC data for the same period.](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Cause:** GA4 shows a "Google tag code isn't configured correctly" error.](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** The error is likely caused by the recent CookieBot implementation, which may be blocking GA4 from collecting data until a user accepts cookies.](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [**Impact:** Inaccurate GA4 data hinders a full understanding of content performance across all traffic sources (organic, referral, direct).](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Resolution:**](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [Aida will ask the GrowthX team to investigate the GA4/CookieBot conflict.](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
      - [Mel suggested Victor (Talaera) may have relevant technical context.](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
      - [**Note:** Amplitude remains the primary source for funnel tracking, which is more critical for business metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)

### Content Performance & Strategy

  - [**Early Results:** Content is indexing fast and generating strong initial traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**Performance:** \>200 clicks from Google Search in under a month.](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**Top Performers:** Broad topics ("how to sign off an email") and "alternatives" articles.](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [**Strategy Adjustment:** Talaera requested prioritizing the 5 remaining blog posts for topics relevant to B2B and customer support.](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Tracking:**](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [**New Prompts:** 50+ bottom-of-funnel prompts (e.g., "best corporate English training platforms") were added to the proprietary monitoring tool.](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This tracks AI visibility for high-intent keywords where AI models may not cite external sources, ensuring Talaera's content is still seen.](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
      - [**Tool Access:** Mel has an invitation to the tool, which shows Talaera's "best prep alternatives" article is cited \>30 times.](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)

### Phase 1 Wrap-up & Handover

  - [**Phase 1 Summary Report:** Aida will deliver a report covering:](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
      - [Project overview & artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
      - [Early performance results](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
      - [Recommendations for Phase 2](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
      - [A case study of another client's long-term traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [**Handover Process:** Aida will hand off the account to a new GrowthX engagement manager for Phase 2.](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The new manager focuses on long-term performance, iteration, and topic refinement.](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
      - [**Continuity:** The new manager is already familiar with the project's process and goals.](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
      - [Prioritize remaining blog posts for B2B/customer support topics.](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
      - [Ask GrowthX team to investigate the GA4/CookieBot conflict.](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [Send email addresses for Amplitude access.](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
      - [Deliver the Phase 1 summary report.](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [**Mel:**](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
      - [Provide Amplitude access upon receiving email addresses.](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
      - [Check the proprietary AI monitoring tool invitation.](https://fathom.video/share/kxK-PNxUiam7mfCHhzduu-fYUY_xWxwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
